form.formComment: Produced a good run, hitting the frame last run (17.31) at Healesville in a Bottom Up - Maiden. Has first look at box 1 this time. Rates a leading player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Produced a good run, hitting the frame last run (17.31) at Healesville in a Bottom Up - Maiden. Has first look at box 1 this time. Rates a leading player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tailed off and collided turning out of back straight.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors at big odds two back when third (17.59) over 300m at Healesville. Draws an inside box and is among the better hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors at big odds two back when third (17.59) over 300m at Healesville. Draws an inside box and is among the better hopes.

form.formComment: Most recently finished 5th on April 10 over 400m at this track behind Stream It beaten 11 lengths (23.52) in a Maiden. Racing well and has to be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Most recently finished 5th on April 10 over 400m at this track behind Stream It beaten 11 lengths (23.52) in a Maiden. Racing well and has to be included.

form.formComment: Improved sharply when third behind Dodging Shadows at this track last start over 400m (23.26). Has good early speed and will stick on.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved sharply when third behind Dodging Shadows at this track last start over 400m (23.26). Has good early speed and will stick on.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Lost ground in home straight.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at The Meadows to win by 1.2 lengths in 30.18, beating Smooth Dynamite. Last start finished last over 525m at The Meadows beaten 8 lengths (31.05) behind No Do Day in a Grade 7 on October 29. Will need to improve to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Did a good job two starts back at The Meadows to win by 1.2 lengths in 30.18, beating Smooth Dynamite. Last start finished last over 525m at The Meadows beaten 8 lengths (31.05) behind No Do Day in a Grade 7 on October 29. Will need to improve to feature.

form.formComment: Last start finished 7th on April 8 over 300m at Healesville behind Be Lively beaten 2 lengths (17.25) in a Bottom Up - Grade 7. Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 7th on April 8 over 300m at Healesville behind Be Lively beaten 2 lengths (17.25) in a Bottom Up - Grade 7. Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth in a Maiden on April 3 over 300m at Healesville behind Linden Boots, beaten 5.5 lengths (17.77). Thereabouts last time others preferred this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished fifth in a Maiden on April 3 over 300m at Healesville behind Linden Boots, beaten 5.5 lengths (17.77). Thereabouts last time others preferred this line-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Raced approaching 200m mark.

form.formComment: Was sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a one length fourth (17.18) over 300m at Healesville. Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a one length fourth (17.18) over 300m at Healesville. Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Checked and lost ground turning off back straight.
